title: 2017 Press Releases
summary: This is a chronological listing page of all Federal Reserve press releases from calendar year 2017, aggregating diverse content including FOMC statements, rate decisions, enforcement actions, banking applications, regulatory proposals, and organizational announcements. The page is not a single archiveable document but rather a navigation index. This source should be rejected as it is a listing page per verification rules.
key_points: Page is a listing/navigation index containing multiple unrelated press releases, not a single focused document
Contains FOMC statements from December 13, November 1, and October 31, 2017 (with associated projections released December 13)
Includes enforcement actions, banking application approvals, regulatory proposals, and organizational announcements throughout 2017
Published by Federal Reserve Board covering the full calendar year 2017
Several items relate to payments system (repo reference rates, Payment System Risk Policy proposals)
FOMC minutes referenced: October 31-November 1 meeting (released November 22) and discount rate meeting minutes from October-November 2017
why_it_matters: Listing pages should not be archived as primary documents. Individual press releases from 2017 (FOMC statements, rate decisions, enforcement actions, etc.) should be sourced separately for actual research value. This index page serves only as a finding aid.
macro_context: This listing page references standard 2017 FOMC statements and releases but contains no substantive macro analysis itself. Specific policy decisions from 2017 are not contained in this index page.
market_structure_context: This listing page references some market structure relevant items (repo reference rates, Regulation M/C changes, Payment System Risk Policy proposals) but these require accessing individual linked press releases for actual content.

issues_found: Source is a listing page containing multiple unrelated press releases, not a single focused document

notes: Non-archiveable listing page.
